message:
feat(search): add LRU caching layer for performance optimization

Add thread-safe LRU cache module for query results, embeddings, and
session fingerprints. This implements the caching strategy defined
in meta_skill-red (Performance Optimization):

- CacheLayer with configurable sizes (query: 128, embedding: 1024, fingerprint: 256)
- Query cache keyed by query string + limit
- Embedding cache with content-hash invalidation
- Session fingerprint cache for suggestion deduplication
- Non-blocking try-lock pattern for concurrent access
- Cache statistics tracking (hits/misses/hit rates)

Includes 9 unit tests covering all cache operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
